TNEACODE 2739 International Summer Internship 2026 Fully Funded Program About The Program Sri Eshwar College of Engineering (SECE), Coimbatore, offers international students a fully funded two-week program combining hands-on technology projects, industry engagement, and cultural immersion across South India. Duration July 27 - Aug 09, 2026 Apply By 5th July, 2026 Why Coimbatore? Often called the “Manchester of South India,” Coimbatore is one of India’s fastest-growing industrial and technology hubs. Home to hundreds of manufacturing firms, IT companies, and startups, the city offers an authentic window into how Indian engineering and entrepreneurship operate at scale. SECE’s location in this ecosystem means internship participants benefit from proximity to real industry — not just classrooms. Begin Your Journey Our streamlined application process starts with a simple registration. Access the portal to receive updates on eligibility requirements and deadlines for the 2026 cohort. Fully Funded Program (Covered: Free Stay, Food, Airport Transfers & Sightseeing & Not Covered : Flights to/from India) Learn Build Explore Experience India Scan below QR code to apply Programmes Track A Smart Systems & IoT Dive into the world of connected devices, sensor networks, and intelligent automation. Participants in this track will work on real IoT deployment scenarios, exploring hardware-software integration, data collection pipelines, and smart system design. Track B Applied AI & Intelligence Explore how artificial intelligence is reshaping industries. This track takes participants from foundational machine learning concepts to real-world applied AI — including computer vision, natural language processing, and decision intelligence. Programme Highlights Hands-on laboratory & industry expert sessions Team-based innovation projects with mentoring Live industry visits & Demo Day exhibition Indian cultural immersion activities Certificate of completion issued by SECE Who Can Apply? We invite international students seeking hands-on training and global exposure: UG & PG students from any recognized international university. Cross-disciplinary: Engineering, Arts, or Science backgrounds. Tech Enthusiasts: Specifically designed for those interested in the future of technology and innovation. All participants receive Complimentary Cultural Tours to explore the heritage of South India. No prior advanced technical experience is required Beyond Boundaries Mobility Programmes at Sri Eshwar Key Tourism Places in Tamil Nadu Life at Sri Eshwar — Through the Lens of Past Student Delegates International airports to coimbatore Chennai Coimbatore 1 Hr -Approx Bangalore Coimbatore 1 Hr -Approx Mumbai Coimbatore 2 Hr -Approx Delhi Coimbatore 3 Hr -Approx Contact Us CIR + 91 82705 48869 (Whatsapp) Email: iroffice@sece.ac.in Linkedin Youtube  X-twitter PROGRAMS UG Programs PG Programs Doctorate Programs MAIN LINKS About Us Academics Research Innovation International Relations Career Development Campus Life Admissions Contact QUICK LINKS Anti-Ragging Cell Grievance Redressal Internal Complaints Counsellor Committee SC/ST Cell SECE @ Media Mandatory Disclosure Security Audit AICTE Feedback Rules and Regulations Policies Contact AICTE Scholarship / Fellowship Schemes ACCREDITATIONS NBA NIRF CALL US +91-4259 200 300 LOCATION COIMBATORE EMAIL sece@sece.ac.in © 2024 Sri Eshwar Engineering College.
